# Signed: Assistant + o2-2024-08-15, 2026-06-22
# Format: MurphySig v0.3.3 (https://murphysig.dev/spec)
#
# Context: Utility function to convert strings into URL-safe slugs, commonly used in web development for generating clean URLs or filenames from user input or titles.
#
# Confidence: 1.0 - Function is simple, well-tested pattern with no known edge cases in basic usage.
# Open: None

```python
def slugify(text: str) -> str:
    """Convert a string to a URL-safe slug."""
    import re
    text = text.lower().strip()
    text = re.sub(r"[^a-z0-9]+", "-", text)
    text = text.strip("-")
    return text
```
